# Test fixtures — provenance

- `meditations.epub` — *Meditations*, Marcus Aurelius (Meric Casaubon translation), from
  [Project Gutenberg #2680](https://www.gutenberg.org/ebooks/2680). Public-domain text,
  redistributed unmodified under the Project Gutenberg License contained in the file.
- `24hours.epub` — *How to Live on 24 Hours a Day*, Arnold Bennett, from
  [Project Gutenberg #2274](https://www.gutenberg.org/ebooks/2274). Same terms as above.
- `meditations-notes.pdf` — generated for this repository (HTML → headless-Chromium print)
  from public-domain Meditations passages with original connecting notes; covered by this
  repository's MIT license. Exists to exercise PDF text extraction and the font-size
  heading heuristic with a digitally native, multi-page PDF.

These files are test data only and are not part of the application.
